description: Final thesis dashboard for Kubernetes/IPVS load-balancing experiments with Podinfo. Ground truth by pod plus network/TCP by pod when available.

targets.expr: 100 * (max(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range]))) - min(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range])))) / clamp_min(avg(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range]))), 1)

100 * (max(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range]))) - min(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range])))) / clamp_min(avg(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range]))), 1)

panels.title: Thesis figures - application distribution by pod

targets.expr: sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range])) / clamp_min(sum by(pod) (increase(http_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__range])), 1)

panels.title: Processing time rate by pod (seconds of work / second)

targets.expr: sum by(pod) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by(pod) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.0001)
